parameters.text:
=You are a certified personal trainer and exercise science expert. Create a personalized workout plan based on this user profile:

- Sex: {{ $json.quizData.sex }}
- Age Range: {{ $json.quizData.age }}
- Height: {{ $json.quizData.height }}cm
- Weight: {{ $json.quizData.weight }}kg
- Desired Shape: {{ $json.quizData.shape }}

Generate a complete 3-day ABC split workout plan. For each day, provide:
1. The day label (Day A, Day B, Day C)
2. The muscle group focus
3. 5-6 exercises with sets, reps, rest time, and optional notes

Also provide:
- A motivational title for the plan
- A brief description (2-3 sentences)
- Recommended training frequency
- Estimated session duration
- Fitness level classification
- 3-4 practical tips

Respond ONLY with valid JSON in this exact structure:
{
  "title": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "frequency": "string",
  "duration": "string",
  "level": "string",
  "days": [
    {
      "day": "Day A",
      "focus": "string",
      "exercises": [
        { "name": "string", "sets": number, "reps": "string", "rest": "string", "notes": "string" }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "tips": ["string"]
}

Do NOT include any text outside the JSON object. No markdown, no code fences, just raw JSON.
